headline: $500 per Month in Passive Income – Invest This Much in These 3 Monthly Dividend Stocks
summary: $500 per month may seem small, but it’s not a trivial amount and can snowball your portfolio quickly. Monthly dividend stocks like Realty Income (NYSE:O), Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC), and Northland Power (OTCMKTS:NPIFF) can make that happen with just $117,000 today. That’s if you equally split that money three ways and buy each of these stocks. ... $500 per Month in Passive Income – Invest This Much in These 3 Monthly Dividend Stocks
